isi.lyrics:
Lyric Queen dia! - LIP♥

Romanization

Welcome to my plastic show
I’ll never let down
oraensigan neomaneul nan gidaryeowasseo

Don’t look so blue
Be good to you
Oh Love is just a game
So can you do it evevy night, every time

Treat me like a lady
neodo algo itjana
igeon ajik dalkomhajiman fragile dose.

Don’t look so blue
Be good to you
Oh Love is just a game
So can you do it evevy night, every time

ung yeogin plastic, no feelings, no lies
I know you want me, even if it's all fake
Wait?

Now
yaong~♥ Boom-Boom!!
shot you down Hu?
Back it up, run that shit like cardiac
The boys mine, my god, you don’t gotta lie
(you don’t gotta lie)
Hu?
Running back oh trap shit

yaong~♥ Boom-Boom!!
shot you down Hu?

isi.lyrics:
Lyric AYAKA - PINKY BOY (English Ver.)

Romanization

Maybe, you got me blushing, you’re on my mind
Don’t you wanna play me?
You make me butterfly, just hold me tight

And boy, you always playin’ like you’re so cool and
And actin’ like you don’t loving
But I know you do love, me so don’t be shy
Tryna hide it, (but) It’s so easy to find ya
Can see the way you smile at me
So Come a little closer, my bae

I want , need ya
Forever, you and I
I'm here with ya
Boy, You’re already mine
Say you want us
Can’t get u out of my mind
Cuz we don’t have to waste our time

Hey baby don’t stop
Boy you make my heart pop
You’re my only pinky boy
Yeah feel me more

(got me)spinning nonstop
All I want is hold ya
You’re my only pinky boy
Been thinking bout you all night long

Crazy, Didn’t see it coming, but you caught my mind
Blushin’ like a cherry
You got me dizzy, spinning all night long
'Just a pinky promise, hold me tight'

[Pre-Hook 2]
I want , need ya
Forever, you and I
I'm here with ya
Boy, You’re already mine
Say you want us
Can’t get u out of my mind
Cuz you’re my favorite love song

Hey baby don’t stop
Boy you make my heart pop
You’re my only pinky boy
Yeah feel me more

(got me)spinning nonstop
All I want is hold ya
You’re my only pinky boy
Been thinking bout you all night long

Baby, tell me you won’t disappear
Fingers intertwined, I
You only let me be like who I’m meant to be

D-D-D-Don’t stop
Boy you make my heart pop
You’re my only pinky boy
Yeah feel me more

(got me)spinning nonstop
All I want is hold ya
You’re my only pinky boy
Been thinking bout you all night long

You know I want you boy,
don’t hide, just hold me tight
Oh let me call you my pinky boy
Been thinking bout you all night long

Hangeul

Maybe, you got me blushing, you’re on my mind
Don’t you wanna play me?
You make me butterfly, just hold me tight

And boy, you always playin’ like you’re so cool and
And actin’ like you don’t loving

Tryna hide it, (but) It’s so easy to find ya
Can see the way you smile at me
So Come a little closer, my bae
